description.en: Bifacial Nameplate Irradiance — front 1000 W/m², rear 135 W/m², AM1.5G, 25 °C cell temp. Bifacial rating reference (IEC TS 60904-1-2).
Bifacial Stress Irradiance — front 1000 W/m², rear 300 W/m², AM1.5G, 25 °C cell temp. High-rear-contribution reference for worst-case Isc (IEC TS 60904-1-2).
Standard Test Conditions — front 1000 W/m², AM1.5G, 25 °C cell temp, no rear irradiance. The default PV nameplate reference (IEC 61215 / IEC 60904-3).
